metadata.description: Ground truth dataset for retrieval quality testing

documents.title: Kubernetes Deployment Guide
documents.content: Learn how to deploy applications on Kubernetes clusters. This guide covers pod configuration, service setup, and deployment strategies including rolling updates and blue-green deployments.

documents.title: Docker Container Best Practices
documents.content: Best practices for building and running Docker containers. Includes image optimization, security hardening, and multi-stage builds for production workloads.

documents.title: Kubernetes Installation Tutorial
documents.content: Step-by-step tutorial for installing Kubernetes on various platforms. Covers kubeadm, kops, and managed Kubernetes services like GKE, EKS, and AKS.

documents.title: Microservices Security Guidelines
documents.content: Security best practices for microservices architecture. Topics include service-to-service authentication, API gateway security, and zero-trust networking.

documents.title: High Availability Architecture
documents.content: Designing high availability systems with automatic failover. Covers load balancing, health checks, circuit breakers, and disaster recovery strategies.

documents.title: PostgreSQL Database Setup
documents.content: Complete guide to setting up PostgreSQL databases. Includes installation, configuration, user management, and connection pooling with PgBouncer.

documents.title: MongoDB Deployment Patterns
documents.content: Deployment patterns for MongoDB in production. Covers replica sets, sharding, backup strategies, and performance optimization techniques.

documents.title: REST vs GraphQL Comparison
documents.content: Detailed comparison between REST and GraphQL APIs. Discusses use cases, performance characteristics, tooling ecosystem, and when to choose each approach.

documents.title: Terraform Infrastructure as Code
documents.content: Learn Terraform for infrastructure automation. Covers providers, modules, state management, and best practices for managing cloud resources with code.

documents.title: Ansible Configuration Management
documents.content: Automate server configuration with Ansible playbooks. Includes inventory management, roles, variables, and idempotent configuration patterns.

documents.title: Kubernetes Troubleshooting Guide
documents.content: Common Kubernetes issues and how to debug them. Covers pod failures, networking problems, resource constraints, and kubectl debugging commands.

documents.title: Load Balancer Configuration
documents.content: Configure load balancers for distributed systems. Includes NGINX, HAProxy, and cloud load balancer setup with health checks and SSL termination.

documents.title: API Gateway Setup
documents.content: Set up API gateways for microservices. Covers Kong, Traefik, and AWS API Gateway with authentication, rate limiting, and request transformation.

documents.title: Failover Strategies
documents.content: Implement automatic failover for critical systems. Discusses active-passive, active-active, and multi-region failover patterns with health monitoring.

documents.title: Service Mesh with Istio
documents.content: Deploy and configure Istio service mesh. Covers traffic management, observability, security policies, and mTLS for service-to-service communication.

documents.title: Database Connection Pooling
documents.content: Optimize database connections with connection pooling. Covers PgBouncer for PostgreSQL, connection pool sizing, and timeout configuration.

documents.title: Docker Swarm vs Kubernetes
documents.content: Compare Docker Swarm and Kubernetes orchestration platforms. Discusses ease of use, scaling capabilities, ecosystem maturity, and production readiness.

documents.title: Zero Trust Security Model
documents.content: Implement zero trust security architecture. Covers identity verification, least privilege access, micro-segmentation, and continuous validation.

documents.title: Prometheus Monitoring Setup
documents.content: Set up Prometheus for metrics monitoring. Includes exporter configuration, PromQL queries, alerting rules, and Grafana dashboard integration.

documents.title: CI/CD Pipeline Best Practices
documents.content: Build effective CI/CD pipelines. Covers automated testing, artifact management, deployment strategies, and rollback procedures for production releases.
